settings.heading: Settings
settings.apiTypeHint: Responses uses the OpenAI Responses API. Chat Completions uses /chat/completions.
settings.name: Name
settings.providerRolesDescription: Assign providers to functions. The main provider is used for chat and world building.
settings.minorTaskAgentDescription: Lightweight LLM for background tasks like phrase extraction and template fitting. Use a small, fast model.
settings.enableMemoryDescription: Automatically save and recall context from past conversations.
settings.memoryProviderDescription: The LLM provider used to extract memories from chat responses.
settings.embeddingProviderDescription: The provider used to generate embeddings for memory search.
settings.phraseHighlightingDescription: Automatically extract and highlight key phrases in narrative text. Requires Minor Task Agent.
settings.pipelineRolesDescription: Assign providers to each pipeline phase. All default to the main provider.
settings.plotPlannerDescription: Plans the scene plot and pacing before writing.
settings.enablePlotPlannerDescription: When enabled, a scene plot is generated for each scene, which enhances pacing and narrative direction for future scenes.
settings.writerDescription: Writes the narrative prose from the scene plot.
settings.reviewerDescription: Reviews writer output for violations against writing rules.
settings.enableReviewerDescription: When enabled, the reviewer checks the writer's output for rule violations, enhancing the quality of the written prose at the cost of additional time and tokens.
settings.editorDescription: Revises writer output based on reviewer feedback.
settings.gameMasterDescription: Generates game data (decisions, plot threads) from the narrative.
settings.summarizerDescription: Updates the act summary after each scene.
settings.targetWordCountDescription: Target word count per scene for the Writer phase. Default: 400.
settings.logLevelDescription: Debug logs include full AI chat context. Logs are written to the app log directory.
settings.noProvidersAdd: No providers configured. Add one to get started.

chat.emptyState: Create a story, add an act, then select or create an act line to start chatting.
chat.emptyChat: Type a message to start chatting with the AI.
chat.worldBuilderPrompt: Answer questions to build your story's world. Say "let's start" when ready.
chat.worldBuilderPlaceholder:
Describe your world...

Enter to send, Shift+Enter for new line.
chat.chatPlaceholder:
Type your message...

Enter to send, Shift+Enter for new line.

sidebar.worldBuilderDescription: Guided interview to create a world from scratch with AI assistance.
sidebar.importWorldDescription: Bring an existing world document and start playing immediately.
sidebar.deleteStoryConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete {name}? All acts and lines within this story will also be removed.
sidebar.deleteActConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete {name}? All lines within this act will also be removed.
sidebar.deleteLineConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete {name}? All messages in this line will also be removed.
sidebar.deleteGenericConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete {name}?

worldBuilderControls.worldReadyPrompt: Your world document is ready. Create the story and start your adventure?
worldBuilderControls.createStoryDescription: Create the story and begin your adventure right away.
worldBuilderControls.discussDirectionDescription: Discuss the story's direction before starting your adventure.
worldBuilderControls.generatingPlot: Generating act plot and starting the game...

characterCards.heading: Generate Character Cards
characterCards.canonicalNamesHint: Canonical names must remain consistent throughout the entire story.
characterCards.perActLineHint: Character cards are maintained per act line (not globally).
characterCards.overwriteHint: If a card for the current act line already exists, it will be overwritten
characterCards.lineageContextHint: Cards are generated from the current act's content. If cards exist for the current act line and previous acts in the lineage, their content contributes to generation context.

importWorld.heading: Import World
importWorld.noActsAdded: No acts added. Click "Add Act" to add one.
importWorld.noCharactersAdded: No characters added. Click "Add Character" to add one.
importWorld.storyImportedSuccessfully: Story imported successfully. You can find it in the sidebar.

memoryManager.heading: Memory Manager
memoryManager.memoryDisabled: Memory is currently disabled in Settings.
memoryManager.noStorySelected: No story selected. Select a story in the sidebar.
memoryManager.configureEmbedding: Please configure an embedding provider in Settings first.
memoryManager.actCardOverrideConfirm: The existing act card will be overridden. Continue?
memoryManager.regenerateMemoriesConfirm: All existing memories for this act line will be deleted and re-extracted. This may take a while depending on the number of exchanges. Continue?
memoryManager.resetMemoriesConfirm: Delete all memories and locations? This cannot be undone.

errors.storyCreationFailed: Story creation failed: missing act line or story reference
